findings.title: Placeholder implementation in production code
findings.detail: Placeholder logic indicates partially developed behavior that may not satisfy intended runtime outcomes.
findings.needed_development_item: Replace placeholder behavior with production implementation and add integration validation for the affected workflow.

findings.title: Dummy/simulated external integration call detected
findings.detail: Simulation or dummy endpoints in production services indicate incomplete external integration paths.
findings.needed_development_item: Replace simulated HTTP calls with real provider integration, resilient error handling, and verified contract tests.

findings.title: Direct color/style set bypasses SfSkinManager (Syncfusion 32.2.3 violation)
findings.detail: Syncfusion best practice requires SfSkinManager to remain the primary theming authority.
findings.needed_development_item: Replace direct BackColor/ForeColor/ThemeName assignments with SfSkinManager.SetVisualStyle and ControlFactory patterns where possible.

findings.title: Docking change without PerformLayout / ForceFullLayout (Syncfusion 32.2.3)
findings.detail: This file uses docking manager patterns but no explicit layout synchronization call was found.
findings.needed_development_item: Add PerformLayout or TriggerForceFullLayout after major docking state changes.
